_doc: Strict per-mechanism budgets enforced by tools/ci/run_core_tests.sh. Override via env (see jit_bench.py / perf_gate.py / run_core_tests.sh). Bump deliberately — every loosening must be justified in HANDOFF.

cold_warmup_s._what: rm -rf cache; warmup_jit(force=True). End-to-end first-time compile + ptxas + autotune.

warm_sentinel_skip_s._what: Process restart with sentinel present; warmup_jit returns False without compiling.

cross_process_reload_s._what: Process restart with sentinel CLEARED but Triton+Quack disk caches PRESENT — must hit disk caches and avoid ptxas/autotune. CuTe still re-compiles in-process.

in_process_reuse_us._what: Same process, second forward through SonicMoEMlpNode. Pure dispatch overhead — no compile.

gpu_projection_us_per_iter._what: nsys GPU-projection µs/iter, FP8 fwd+bwd, canonical Ernie shape. Baseline = Session 53 PyTorch native ~2715 µs; budget allows S70+ regressions.
